_meta.note: leads.assigned_to → profiles.id (internal UUID). profiles.clerk_user_id is the Clerk bridge. todos.assigned_to is TEXT (Clerk user ID directly, not FK).

_user_identity.clerk_user_id: TEXT stored in profiles.clerk_user_id — not an FK
_user_identity.leads.assigned_to: UUID → profiles(id) — use profiles.id to join, not Clerk ID
_user_identity.todos.assigned_to: TEXT — stores Clerk user ID directly (no FK)
